items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm the implementation of the 'Secure browser lockdown' feature. While the linked use case mentions that the secure browser launches and blocks other applications, there are no specific details or evidence of how this is executed in the system. This lack of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this requirement.
